_note: Claude Code-authored 24h narratives for the 2026-07-02 window, keyed by 15-char opp_id. Seeds the demo; run.py overlays these onto the structured record, falling back to the deterministic summary for opps not listed.
_guidance: A 24h summary reports DEAL MOVEMENT only: did the deal move forward (stage/amount/close-date/forecast), does the buyer need something (Next Step, an inbound ask), or did WE do something that impacted it (sent an email/RFP, held or scheduled a meeting, moved commercials). Do NOT write about CRM housekeeping — ownership/co-owner reassignment, Type/Probability/Source edits, field cleanups. Those are administration, not movement, and must never be the subject of a summary. If the only in-window change is housekeeping, the deal has no summary-worthy activity.
006P700000JwvB3: VP Anthony Gray upgraded the forecast Best Case → Commit — a leadership-level vote of confidence. In parallel the team ran a 'Bright Horizons ⟷ Zycus SOW workshop' email thread (sent, reply received, follow-up). The deal is moving from shortlist toward contracting; SOW scoping is now the live workstream. Next: lock the SOW workshop date and confirm what the Commit is predicated on for the Jul 31 close.
006P700000NwbBd: A previously quiet Formal-Evaluation deal re-activated. Next Step was refreshed: '50% confidence, RFP coming shortly, estimated costing reviewed — deal is back in motion; CK to set up F2F and navigate exec levels.' Five emails moved on 'Haeco/Zycus e-Procurement — next steps' plus follow-ups. Next: get the F2F booked and confirm the RFP timing ahead of the Aug 30 close.
006P7000009O2Ri: Late-stage contracting activity: four emails on 'Zycus SOW signatory' and 'clean documents for signature.' Next Step notes 'all docs out for signature; Order 1 + MSA sent; SOW still needs rework due to a scope increase.' The close date (Jun 30) has now passed. Next: chase the signatory, finalize the expanded SOW, and reset the close date in Salesforce.
006P700000Xl06R: Pre-contract diligence in motion on a Vendor-Selected deal: 10 emails around a Publicis compliance / self-assessment questionnaire and a 'Confirmation Call Monday 9:30 CET,' plus a 'Zycus–PG review' meeting scheduled. Next: complete the questionnaire, hold the PG review, and drive to the Jul 15 close.
006P700000J71MD: A full onsite engagement day on a top Upside deal: two Avoma-recorded onsite sessions — 'Zycus (Onsite) Teil 1' and 'Teil 2' — plus a 'Blocker' working session. Transcripts are ready. Next: mine the transcripts for the blocker raised and any commitments made, and confirm the path to the Jul 23 close.
006P700000GWfrf: Commercial negotiation active: emails on 'TTI – Zycus Updated Commercials' (sent + replies received) on a Shortlisted deal. The buyer is engaging on pricing. Next: confirm TTI's reaction to the updated commercials and the path to a decision before the Jul 30 close.
006P700000WWRku: RFP engagement: emails on 'Sitecore P2P Platform RFP – Invite to Participate,' across both Clari and Outreach (inbound + outbound). Next: confirm Zycus's participation in the RFP and the submission timeline for the Aug 12 close.
006P700000XjHg3: Demo scheduling on a Formal-Evaluation deal: emails on 'SABIC x Zycus: Demo' (sent + reply received). Next: lock the demo date and align on the evaluation criteria.
006P700000QKfzN: Next Step refreshed to '50% confidence, 02 Jul — requested an update on the process; decision delayed a bit further, offered assistance.' One email on 'CLM RFP – Evaluation Update.' The buyer's timeline is slipping. Next: press for a concrete decision date and keep the evaluation warm.
006P700000JM8aH: Activity on the ANA PoC: an email 'Checking in on activity feedback' plus an 'ANA – PoC – Weekly Follow-Up' meeting scheduled. Next: run the weekly PoC follow-up and capture feedback to sustain momentum.
006P700000XlSVh: Deal is at PO Received (won). A supplier-integration workshop thread ('Temporary Change in Workshop Lead') was logged along with Avoma core-leadership calls. Next: confirm the workshop-lead handover and transition into delivery/onboarding.
006P700000PtQGP: A 'Mair Group / Zycus project' meeting was scheduled on this Contract-In-Progress Commit deal — the one movement worth noting in-window. Next: confirm the meeting agenda and lock the contracting timeline ahead of close.
